name: Wang Lin
affiliation: independent (multi-sect legacy: Heng Yue Sect → Cloud Sky Sect → Soul Refining Sect → Heavenly Fate Sect → Da Lou Sword Sect → Vermilion Bird Divine Sect → Origin Sect → Great Soul Sect → Dark Scorpion Clan → Sealed Realm → Cave World owner)
location: Planet Suzaku / Cave World / Immortal Astral Continent
knownFacts: Discovered the Heaven Defying Bead in a dead bird under a cliff as a child
Awakened the Ji Realm and later inherited Tu Si's Ancient God knowledge
Became the 6th-Generation Vermilion Bird Divine Emperor and Lord of the Sealed Realm
Killed the Seven-Colored Daoist to become the owner of the Cave World
Transcended with Li Muwan after crossing the 9 Heaven Trampling Bridges

name: Wang Tianshui
location: Wang Family Village, Country of Zhao
knownFacts: Wang Lin's father; called him 'Tie Zhu' to ward off bad fortune
Killed by Teng Huayuan; soul trapped in Teng's soul flag
Soul rescued by Situ Nan into the Heaven Defying Bead; later released

name: Zhou Tingsu
location: Wang Family Village, Country of Zhao
knownFacts: Wang Lin's mother
Killed by Teng Huayuan; soul trapped in Teng's soul flag
Soul rescued by Situ Nan and later released

name: Wang Tianshan
location: Wang Family Village, Country of Zhao
knownFacts: Wang Lin's fourth uncle; risked his sect position to get Wang Lin into Heng Yue Sect
Targeted by Teng Huayuan's diviner but spared
Survived the Wang Clan annihilation

name: Wang Zhuo
location: Wang Family Village, Country of Zhao
knownFacts: Wang Lin's cousin; married Teng Xiuxiu under duress after clan annihilation
Killed his wife and himself rather than betray the Wang clan; Wang Lin saved and reincarnated him
Wang Lin helped him form Nascent Soul; guarded the Wang family until lifespan ended

name: Wang Hao
location: Wang Family Village, Country of Zhao
knownFacts: Wang Lin's cousin
Spared by Teng Huayuan because he was a sect member
One of the few Wang Clan survivors

name: Wang Ping
knownFacts: Wang Lin's son by Mu Bingmei/Liu Mei; refined into a resentful spirit by Liu Mei
Raised by Wang Lin as a mortal in a desolate village
His death triggered Wang Lin's Karma Domain evolution; eventually reunited with Wang Lin

name: Wang Yiyi
affiliation: Vast Dao Palace / Wang Lin's lineage
knownFacts: Wang Lin and Li Muwan's daughter; Saintess of the Vast Dao Palace
Escaped destruction of Vast Dao Palace by inhabiting a mask
Married Wang Baole (AWWP protagonist); brought back to Xiangang Continent by Wang Lin

name: Wang Jiduo
knownFacts: Wang Lin's adopted son/godson on the IAC
Of the Ancient Clan Primordial lineage
Wang Lin enabled him to become Imperial Venerable

name: Zhou Ru
knownFacts: Wang Lin's adopted daughter; vessel for Li Muwan's soul (intended)
Li Muwan chose not to devour Zhou Ru's soul; calls Wang Lin 'uncle'
Reincarnated on IAC and lives an ordinary life

name: Qing Yi
knownFacts: Wang Ping's wife (daughter-in-law to Wang Lin)

name: Song Yu
knownFacts: Wang Jiduo's wife

name: Wang Baole
knownFacts: AWWP protagonist; Wang Yiyi's husband, therefore Wang Lin's son-in-law
Mentored/protected by Wang Lin ('Paragon Wang') in AWWP
Inherits the Eight Extreme Dao from Wang Lin

name: Li Qiqing
knownFacts: Li Muwan's older brother; raised her after their parents died
Luo He Sect elite disciple

name: Teng Xiuxiu
knownFacts: Wang Zhuo's wife (forced marriage after Wang Clan annihilation)
Killed by Wang Zhuo when he chose the Wang clan over her

name: Dao Master Blue Dreams
knownFacts: Li Qianmei's father; taught Wang Lin Light Shadow Shield and Dao Art Fusion
Healed Li Qianmei at the cost of her memories
Wang Lin injured his palm at one point

name: Li Muwan
affiliation: Luo He Sect / Cloud Sky Sect
location: Fire Burn Country / Chu Country / Cave World
knownFacts: Met Wang Lin escaping a Fire Beast; drained life force to refine Azure Dragon Jade Slip for him
Failed Nascent Soul formation multiple times; died at 500 years old
Soul preserved in Heaven Defying Bead 700 years; resurrected by Wang Lin at 4th Step; transcends with him

name: Li Qianmei
knownFacts: Daughter of Dao Master Blue Dream; Wang Lin's second wife
Smeared blood on Wang Lin's stone-petrified body for 10 years to save him from Daoist Water
Healed by her father at the cost of losing most memories of Wang Lin

name: Mu Bingmei
knownFacts: Liu Mei's true form; Wang Lin's third wife
Had a son with Wang Lin (Wang Ping) whom she refined into a resentful spirit out of hatred
Wang Lin severed karmic ties with her via the Dream Dao; one of his clones accompanies her

name: Situ Nan
peakRealm: Yang Solid Peak (reconstructed); Heaven Trampling (IAC reincarnation)
affiliation: Vermilion Bird Country / Wu Xuan Country
knownFacts: Originally the Green Soul of the Seven-Colored Immortal Venerable; betrayed by 3rd-Gen Vermilion Bird
Fled into the Heaven Defying Pearl; met Wang Lin and became his first mentor
Sacrificed his remaining power to save Wang Lin; reincarnated on IAC as 'Si Nan' Grand Marshal of Wu Xuan Country

name: All-Seer
knownFacts: Mortal-realm schemer ruling the Heavenly Fate Sect; false mentor to Wang Lin
Plotted to absorb source origins of Wang Lin, Ling Tianhou, and Blood Ancestor
Taught Wang Lin the Celestial Slaughter Art with a trap inside; killed by Wang Lin

name: Tu Si
knownFacts: His body became the Land of the Ancient God (3-level Chaotic Broken Stars realm)
Granted Wang Lin the 'Great Enlightened One' title and 'knowledge' inheritance
Tuo Sen inherited his 'power' inheritance (born from Tu Si's failed Ink Flow Split Soul Technique)

name: Du Tian
knownFacts: Soul Refining Sect ancestor; gave Wang Lin the Ten Billion Soul Banner and sect inheritance
Helped Wang Lin's clone reach Nascent Soul peak and true body reach 3-Star Ancient God
Erased his own consciousness to become a soul within the Soul Banner

name: Bai Fan
knownFacts: Wang Lin inherited Bai Fan's Mountain Crumble spell and Six Paths Triple Techniques
Found Bai Fan's Collection Pavilion in the Thunder Immortal World
Long dead; inheritance passed to Wang Lin

name: Lu Yun
affiliation: Four Divine Sect / Vermilion Bird Divine Sect / Heng Yue Sect
knownFacts: 5th-Gen Vermilion Bird Divine Emperor; secret identity was Huang Long Zhenren, Heng Yue Sect master
Gave Wang Lin the Vermilion Bird Sequence and taught him the Nine Mysterious Transformations
Infiltrated Cultivation Alliance HQ to gather info on Qing Shui; died after returning

name: Qing Lin
knownFacts: Wang Lin's 'master in name'; father of Qing Shuang
Left the Body Fixation Art for Qing Shuang; Wang Lin accidentally obtained it
Possessed by Taga (ancient demon); Wang Lin fought to save him

name: Su Dao
knownFacts: Wang Lin's 'Scholar' mentor
Tangential figure in the story

name: Xuan Luo

Helped over a dozen of Wang Lin's friends reincarnate into the Immortal Execution Continent

name: Qing Shui
affiliation: Qing Shui Kingdom / Colorful Immortal Venerable's slaughter soul
knownFacts: Formed from the Seven-Colored Immortal Venerable's lifetime of slaughter

Killed Russell with Ji Realm for offending Wang Lin; reincarnated on IAC with memories auto-recovered

name: Zhou Yi
knownFacts: Found Qing Shuang's corpse and called her 'Ting'er'; defected from his sect to protect her

name: Qing Shuang
knownFacts: Qing Lin's daughter; 'Ting'er' to Zhou Yi; the Body Fixation Art was her inheritance

Her remnant soul awakened and transformed Zhou Yi into the Rain Immortal Sword's spirit; reincarnated with Zhou Yi on IAC

knownFacts: Giant Demon Clan member who gifted Wang Lin the Star Compass

name: Li Yuan

name: Lin Yi
